headline: Lilly's EBGLYSS (lebrikizumab-lbkz) delivered up to four years of durable disease control for patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis
summary: New long-term data show Eli Lilly and Company's (NYSE: LLY) EBGLYSS (lebrikizumab-lbkz) delivered durable skin clearance and relief from persistent itch for up to four years for patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis (eczema) in an open-label extension study offering once-monthly maintenance injection. Interim findings from the first year of the ADlong Phase 3b study will be presented at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting, taking place March 27-31 in Denver.1
